datasette.utils.__init__.await_me_maybe.docstring: If value is callable, call it. If awaitable, await it. Otherwise return it.

datasette.utils.__init__.urlsafe_compone.docstring: Splits token on commas and tilde-decodes each component

datasette.utils.__init__.path_from_row_p.docstring:
Generate an optionally tilde-encoded unique identifier
    for a row from its primary keys.

datasette.utils.__init__.detect_primary_.docstring: Figure out primary keys for a table.

datasette.utils.__init__.is_url.docstring: Must start with http:// or https:// and contain JUST a URL

datasette.utils.__init__.to_css_class.docstring:
Given a string (e.g. a table name) returns a valid unique CSS class.
    For simple cases, just returns the string again. If the string is not a
    valid CSS class (we disallow - and _ prefixes even though they are valid
    as they may be confused with browser prefixes) we strip invalid characters
    and add a 6 char md5 sum suffix, to make sure two tables with identical
    names after stripping characters don't end up with the same CSS class.

datasette.utils.__init__.MultiParams.get.docstring: Return first value in the list, if available

datasette.utils.__init__.parse_metadata.docstring: Detects if content is JSON or YAML and parses it appropriately.

datasette.utils.__init__.resolve_env_sec.docstring: Create copy that recursively replaces {"$env": "NAME"} with values from environ

datasette.utils.__init__.initial_path_fo.docstring: Return suggested path for opening this Datasette, based on number of DBs and tables
